This page was generated using data obtained on various dates including 2023-10-02, 2023-09-29, 2023-10-13, -data-was-not-downloaded-for-now-. Please, send me a message if you want it updated!




Proposed edits at this page are so obvious that automatic edit makes sense.

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for operator prefixed tags

node(9482311101)['operator:wikidata'='Q1613532']['operator:wikipedia'='en:Hermes Group']; node(9523685159)['operator:wikidata'='Q1613532']['operator:wikipedia'='en:Hermes Group']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for operator prefixed tags']


wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for network prefixed tags
network:wikidata and network:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because network:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for name:etymology prefixed tags
name:etymology:wikidata and name:etymology:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because name:etymology:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q43482 vs (missing) article redirects from de:Franken (Ethnie) to de:Franken (Volk)
Frankenstraße - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( way(27492650)['name:etymology:wikidata'='Q43482']['name:etymology:wikipedia'='de:Franken (Ethnie)']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for name:etymology prefixed tags']

Other useful resources

JOSM Wikipedia plugin


Note to self: online version hosted at https://matkoniecz.github.io/OSM-wikipedia-tag-validator-reports, files are stored at https://github.com/matkoniecz/OSM-wikipedia-tag-validator-reports.
